baseline.activity: Construction site with concrete block wall construction and crane/lifting equipment
violations: Worker not wearing visible hard hat
Worker not wearing visible high-visibility vest
Improper personal protective equipment (PPE) compliance
Potential fall hazard - worker at elevation without apparent fall protection

spatial_claims.location: atop concrete masonry unit wall, center-right frame

violations: Fall protection absent: worker positioned on unguarded wall edge at estimated 2.3m elevation (OSHA 1926.502 requires fall protection above 1.8m)
No visible guardrail, safety net, or personal fall arrest system at elevated work surface
vima.spatial_reasoning: Elevation estimated from visible CMU course heights (~0.2m per course, approximately 11-12 courses visible). Worker stance and perspective converge lines indicate standing atop finished wall. Blue sky and clear shadows provide strong depth cues. Wide-angle lens introduces perspective distortion; distance estimates ±0.3m variance.
depth_cues: relative scale of CMU blocks to human figure

baseline.activity: Construction site with concrete block wall assembly and crane/lifting equipment operations
violations: Worker visible without hard hat (yellow-vested worker in center background)
Potential fall hazard - worker appears to be at elevated height without visible fall protection equipment
Incomplete or improperly secured scaffolding/work platform visible

spatial_claims.location: atop concrete masonry unit wall, center-right frame

violations: Fall protection absent: worker positioned at ~2.4m elevation on unguarded wall edge (OSHA 1926.502(b)(1) requires fall protection above 1.8m)
No visible personal fall arrest system, safety net, or warning line system
vima.spatial_reasoning: Elevation estimated via CMU block courses (standard 20cm height), visible stacked courses indicate ~2.4m height. Wide-angle fisheye distortion reduces distance precision. Worker proximity to wall edge without visible barriers creates fall hazard. Clear blue sky and shadow angles confirm outdoor construction site with high sun angle.
depth_cues_used: CMU coursing regularity for scale reference

baseline.activity: Rooftop construction work with crane operations and worker activity on elevated platform
violations: Workers appear to lack visible fall protection equipment (harnesses/lanyards) while working at height on rooftop
Incomplete or inadequate guardrail systems visible on elevated work platform
Workers in proximity to crane operations without clear segregation or spotting procedures evident

spatial_claims.location: on elevated concrete block wall structure

violations: Fall protection absent: worker on elevated structure exceeding 1.8m threshold (OSHA 1926.502)
No visible guardrails, safety netting, or personal fall arrest system
Uncontrolled access to elevated wall edges
vima.spatial_reasoning: Distance estimated via perspective geometry and concrete block coursing (standard CMU ~20cm per course, ~12 courses visible = ~2.4m structural height). Worker positioned on wall top surface at approximately 2.4m elevation. Wide-angle lens distortion reduces confidence in absolute measurements but confirms elevation exceeds OSHA 1.8m threshold.

baseline.activity: Construction site with elevated work platform and personnel
violations: Worker appears to be at height without visible fall protection equipment
No visible hard hat on worker
Inadequate guardrailing or fall arrest system visible
Worker in elevated area without proper PPE
Fall protection absent: worker at approximately 1.8m+ elevation on open platform without visible guardrail, safety net, or personal fall arrest system (OSHA 1926.502)
Open edge unprotected: right side perimeter wall edge lacks required 1.1-1.2m guardrail or equivalent protection
vima.spatial_reasoning: Wide-angle perspective shows worker on elevated concrete platform with clear sight line to unguarded drop-off. Elevation estimated via CMU block courses (approx 0.2m per course, ~9 courses visible = 1.8m+). Guardrail absence confirmed by unobstructed view of exposed edge. Perspective distortion managed using vanishing points and rectilinear structure alignment.

baseline.activity: Concrete pump truck operation on construction site with elevated platform/structure
violations: Workers appear to be in close proximity to moving equipment without visible fall protection
Potential lack of proper barricading or exclusion zones around active pump truck operations
Workers may be operating at heights without visible personal protective equipment (PPE) such as hard hats or safety harnesses
Unclear if proper spotters are in place for equipment operation

spatial_claims.location: atop concrete wall structure, center-right frame

violations: OSHA 1926.502(b)(1): Fall protection required at elevations ≥1.8m; worker at ~2.2m lacks visible fall arrest system, guardrails, or safety net
OSHA 1926.501(b)(1): Employee working at heights without personal fall arrest system or equivalent protection
vima.spatial_reasoning: Elevation estimated via CMU block module dimensions (~20cm per course visible); perspective convergence and relative scale of worker to masonry units; clear sky line provides horizon reference for depth estimation; slight wide-angle lens distortion reduces confidence at frame edges
depth_cues: Relative size of worker vs. CMU blocks
